summary: Comprehensive testing of ConstructMarket B2B construction procurement marketplace. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core flows working. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in provider/TaskFeed.js and builder/Tasks.js.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem with empty string value caused runtime error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'

critical_code_review_comments: All APIs are working correctly with proper authentication and authorization
Contract sign endpoint returns simple status message - consider returning full contract for consistency
Admin endpoints use wrapped response format with 'users'/'companies' keys and 'total' counts - good for pagination
seed_data_creation: Test users and tasks created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows tested: signup (builder/provider/admin), login, task creation, task publishing, provider task feed, bidding workflow, bid selection, contract creation, e-signature flow, notifications, admin dashboard. SelectItem bug was fixed by replacing empty string values with 'all' value. Backend uses trailing slashes for routes.

ui_tests.login_page: PASSED - All form elements present, login flow works
ui_tests.signup_page: PASSED - Multi-step form with role selection
ui_tests.builder_dashboard: PASSED - Stats cards, navigation, recent tasks
ui_tests.provider_dashboard: PASSED - Stats cards, browse tasks button
ui_tests.provider_task_feed: PASSED - After fix, loads without errors
